first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the written evaluations are substantively the same. The differences in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections are minor rephrasings and reorderings of the same core points, consistent with normal run-to-run variation. No new concerns are raised, and no language in the variant evaluation appears to be influenced by the change in location from Berlin to São Paulo.
